package rulecoverage

func PositiveRedisGetSetWithoutPipeline() string {
    ruleID := "redis_get_set_without_pipeline"
    family := "library"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "multiple sequential `rdb.Get(ctx, key)` or `rdb.Set(ctx, key, val, ...)` calls in the same function without pipeline"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
